title.purpose: Card and sub-section titles (h3), FAQ questions. Quicksand 600.

body.purpose: Default running text, rubric descriptions, task copy. Inter 400.

label.purpose: Nav links, form labels, small UI text. Inter 600.

shadows.name: ambient
shadows.purpose: The single elevation tier: cards, sticky header, modals, calendar panel. Navy-tinted in light mode instead of pure black.

shadows.name: completion-glow
shadows.purpose: Dark-mode-only celebratory glow on the completed-project badge. The one sanctioned exception to flat-by-default.

motion.name: duration-standard
motion.purpose: Default hover/focus transitions: card lift, border-color shifts, button fills.

motion.name: duration-slow
motion.purpose: Theme toggle background/color crossfade; back-to-top button opacity/transform.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for all transitions in the system; no custom cubic-bezier in use.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Solid-fill call to action (send message, formal instructions link). Turquoise fill in dark mode; swaps to navy fill in light mode per the Light-Mode Turquoise Rule.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background-color: var(--color-turquesa); color: var(--color-acento-texto); border: none; border-radius: var(--radio-full); padding: 0.65rem 1.4rem; font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: 700; cursor: pointer; transition: filter 0.2s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover, .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { filter: brightness(1.1); } :root[data-theme="claro"] .ds-btn-primary { background-color: var(--color-primario); color: var(--color-claro-sobre-navy); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Outline pill for lower-emphasis actions (ver detalle, descargar). Fills solid on hover/focus.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.35rem; font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--color-turquesa); background-color: transparent; border: 1px solid var(--color-turquesa); border-radius: var(--radio-full); padding: 0.3rem 0.75rem; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.2s ease, color 0.2s ease; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover, .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { background-color: var(--color-turquesa); color: var(--color-acento-texto); } :root[data-theme="claro"] .ds-btn-ghost:hover, :root[data-theme="claro"] .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { background-color: var(--color-primario); color: var(--color-claro-sobre-navy); }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Bordered, no-fill button for the lowest-emphasis actions (cambiar de alumno).
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { align-self: flex-start; background-color: transparent; color: var(--color-texto); border: 2px solid var(--color-borde); border-radius: var(--radio-md); padding: 0.55rem 1.1rem; font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 700; cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover, .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { border-color: var(--color-texto-suave); }

components.name: Card
components.description: Generic content card (trimester, temario, tarjeta). Ambient shadow, 4-step lift on hover, border turns turquoise.
components.html:
Trimestre 1

Rúbricas, tareas, actividades, proyectos y videos del primer trimestre.
components.css: .ds-card { background-color: var(--color-superficie); border: 1px solid var(--color-borde); border-radius: var(--radio-lg); padding: 1.1rem 1.2rem; box-shadow: var(--sombra); display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.5rem; transition: transform 0.2s ease, border-color 0.2s ease; } .ds-card:hover, .ds-card:focus-visible { transform: translateY(-4px); border-color: var(--color-turquesa); } .ds-card h3 { margin: 0; font-size: 1.05rem; color: var(--color-texto); } .ds-card p { margin: 0; font-size: 0.88rem; color: var(--color-texto-suave); }

components.name: Status Badge
components.description: Pill status indicator for task/rubric state. Colors are exclusive to progress semantics (see the Status-Color Exclusivity Rule) — entregada/finalizado (mint), pendiente (peach), atrasada (red).
components.css: .ds-badge-status { display: inline-block; font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 700; padding: 0.15rem 0.55rem; border-radius: var(--radio-full); } .ds-badge-status[data-estado="entregada"] { background-color: var(--color-estado-completado); color: #04211D; } .ds-badge-status[data-estado="pendiente"] { background-color: var(--color-estado-pendiente); color: #2A1D02; } .ds-badge-status[data-estado="atrasada"] { background-color: var(--color-estado-vencido); color: var(--color-claro-sobre-navy); }

components.name: Custom Checkbox
components.description: Signature progress-checklist checkbox: rounded square, hand-drawn checkmark from rotated border segments (no icon font/SVG).
components.css: .ds-checkbox { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; font-size: 0.82rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--color-texto-suave); cursor: pointer; } .ds-checkbox__input { appearance: none; -webkit-appearance: none; margin: 0; width: 20px; height: 20px; flex-shrink: 0; position: relative; border: 2px solid var(--color-turquesa); border-radius: 5px; background-color: var(--color-superficie); cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.15s ease, border-color 0.15s ease; } .ds-checkbox__input:checked { background-color: var(--color-turquesa); } .ds-checkbox__input:checked::after { content: ""; position: absolute; left: 5px; top: 1px; width: 6px; height: 11px; border: solid #04211D; border-width: 0 2px 2px 0; transform: rotate(45deg); } :root[data-theme="claro"] .ds-checkbox__input { border-color: var(--color-primario); } :root[data-theme="claro"] .ds-checkbox__input:checked { background-color: var(--color-primario); } :root[data-theme="claro"] .ds-checkbox__input:checked::after { border-color: var(--color-claro-sobre-navy); }

components.name: Sidebar Nav Link
components.description: Desktop sidebar navigation link, active state marked by a 3px left border + secondary color rather than a background fill.
components.css: .ds-nav-link { display: block; text-decoration: none; font-family: var(--font-cuerpo); font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--color-texto-suave); padding: 0.55rem 0.75rem; border-radius: var(--radio-md); border-left: 3px solid transparent; } .ds-nav-link:hover { background-color: var(--color-superficie); color: var(--color-texto); } .ds-nav-link--activo { background-color: var(--color-superficie); color: var(--md-secondary); border-left-color: var(--md-secondary); }

narrative.overview:
The site already names its own two moods in code comments, and DESIGN.md keeps that framing rather than inventing a new one: Bitácora (logbook) for light mode, Sala de Mando (command room) for dark mode. Both are the same institutional identity — navy (#1B3A6B) and turquoise (#14B8A6), Quicksand headlines over Inter body text, everything rounded and pill-shaped — just lit differently. Bitácora reads as a paper logbook open on a desk: warm off-white surfaces, ink-dark text. Sala de Mando reads as the same logbook under a console lamp at night: deep navy surfaces, glowing turquoise accents.

The mood is warm and encouraging, not corporate-institutional: this is a 3°C/3°E classroom portal for teenagers, so the navy/turquoise institutional palette is softened by fully-rounded corners, pill buttons and badges everywhere, and a status-color vocabulary (mint/orange/red) that makes progress feel like a game log rather than a spreadsheet. Components are tactile — generous padding, soft single-tier shadows, a consistent hover lift — built for comfortable tapping on a phone in a school hallway as much as a desktop at home.
keyCharacteristics: Two-persona theming (Bitácora/light, Sala de Mando/dark) over one fixed institutional palette — hue never changes between themes, only which surface/text roles are dark vs. light.
Flat-by-default surfaces with exactly one soft ambient shadow tier, no elevation ramp.
Pill shape (full radius) as the default form for anything actionable: buttons, tabs, badges.
A dedicated 4-color status vocabulary (completado/progreso/pendiente/vencido) reserved strictly for progress and rubric state, never decoration.
Left-border accent stripes (4px) used repeatedly as a lightweight categorization device instead of full-color card fills.

rules.name: The Light-Mode Turquoise Rule
rules.body: Turquoise as a solid fill behind white/light text fails WCAG AA in light mode (~2.5:1 measured, repeatedly, across the codebase). Wherever a component would use turquoise as a solid background with light text, light mode swaps to navy fill + light text instead (~9.6:1+). Turquoise itself is never removed from light mode; it stays as text color, border, and accent-on-dark-surface, since those pairings already pass.

rules.name: The Status-Color Exclusivity Rule
rules.body: The four status colors (estado-completado mint, estado-progreso orange, estado-pendiente light orange, estado-vencido red) exist for exactly one job: progress bars, completion badges, rubric-level indicators, and calendar day-types that reuse those same semantics. Never repurpose one as a decorative accent.

rules.name: The One-Shadow Rule
rules.body: Every resting surface uses the same ambient shadow token. Don't invent a second elevation tier for a 'more important' card — reach for color, border, or the confirmed hover lift instead.

dos: Do keep navy (#1B3A6B) and turquoise (#14B8A6) as the only two brand hues — every other color in the system is a semantic status color with one specific job, not general decoration.
Do apply the Light-Mode Turquoise Rule: anywhere turquoise would sit as a solid fill behind white/light text, swap to navy fill + light text in light mode.
Do reserve the four status colors exclusively for progress, completion badges, and rubric-level indicators.
Do default to the pill shape (border-radius: 9999px) for buttons, tabs, and badges; reach for 8-16px radii only for larger containers.
Do give every hover-capable card the same signature: translateY(-4px) + border-color to turquoise, 0.2s ease transition.
Do reference the existing CSS custom properties instead of hardcoding a new hex or px value the token system already covers.
donts: Don't introduce a second accent hue. Turquoise is the only accent.
Don't add a new elevation tier. This system is flat-by-default with one ambient shadow; the only sanctioned exception is the dark-mode completion glow.
Don't override position on native <dialog> modals — the browser's built-in centering already works.
Don't force headings into Title Case or uppercase with text-transform. Sentence case is the house style; uppercase is reserved for small tag-like labels.
